mapper.sql: SELECT c.id AS connection_id, c.reason, c.weight, c.category, fm.id AS from_movie_id, fm.title AS from_movie_title, fm.release_year AS from_release_year, fm.director AS from_director, fm.picture_url AS from_picture_url, fm.external_id AS from_external_id, tm.id AS to_movie_id, tm.title AS to_movie_title, tm.release_year AS to_release_year, tm.director AS to_director, tm.picture_url AS to_picture_url, tm.external_id AS to_external_id FROM connections c JOIN movies fm ON fm.id = c.from_movie_id JOIN movies tm ON tm.id = c.to_movie_id
mapper.select: WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.update_time DESC, c.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO connections ( from_movie_id, to_movie_id, reason, weight, category, user_id, creation_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{fromMovie.id}, #{toMovie.id}, #{reason}, #{weight}, #{category}, #{user.id}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE connections SET reason = #{reason}, weight = #{weight}, category = #{category}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{user.id}
